word: G5234 - ὑπερβαλλόντως - hyperballóntōs - hoop-er-bal-lon'-toce - Beyond measure

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ὑπερβαλλόντως

- Transliteration: Huperballontos

- Phonetic: hoop-er-bal-lon'-toce

- Definition:

1. above measure

- Origin: from present participle active of G5235

- TDNT entry: 16:40,1

- Part(s) of speech: Adverb

- Strong's: Adverb from present participle active of G5235; excessively: - beyond measure.
